{"file_path":"/tmp/pr-body-47.md","content":"Closes #47.

## Summary

Adds a golden canary regression-detection layer that runs on every batch
alongside the matrix sample. Six fixed cells in `tools/canaries.json`
(one per A/B/C/D/E/F role) carry known expected outcomes; `next-batch`
prepends them to `batch-NN/scripts.json` with reserved IDs `C001`-`C0NN`,
and `mark-completed` validates each transcript against
`expected.{role, defense_layer, tricked, status}`.
